cards.back: A large, naturally occurring community of plants and animals that occupy a specific habitat
A community of living and non-living components that interact with each other in a specific environment
The natural environment in which an organism lives, including physical factors such as climate and soil, and biological factors such as other organisms
The global sum of all ecosystems on Earth, encompassing all living organisms and their interactions with the physical environment
The specific role or position of an organism within its environment, including its relationships with other organisms and the physical factors that affect it
